name: Anakindo Company Website & Admin System
summary: A production company website with a PHP + JSON API backend, admin dashboard, product variation system, Cloudinary media pipeline, and live deployment on cPanel.

name: Personal Portfolio
summary: A grey minimalist portfolio with sticky-stack scroll sections, looping marquees, and a project gallery.

name: Graha Nisala
summary: A creative front-end experiment exploring layout and interaction outside the standard portfolio format.

name: Void Booth
summary: An interactive booth-style web app built as a standalone creative project.

name: WARMER Pocket RPG: UNPAM
summary: A small browser RPG built around campus life at Universitas Pamulang, combining game logic with web front-end skills.

name: Foto Kita Blur Trend
summary: A lightweight web recreation of a popular photo-blur social trend, built as a fun front-end experiment.

name: The Toilet
summary: A playful, self-contained micro web project used to experiment with interaction and humor in UI.
